title: Tyholora Primary hosts Dear Girl Child session
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Tyholora Primary School presented a fruitful event titled ‘Dear Girl Child’ at the school hall on Friday afternoon, 12 September.


> This exciting open programme is designed to equip and educate Grade four to seven girls.


The event was attended by respected figures in the local community: Xoliswa Booi and Thandeka Gomomo of Social Development, Patience Shipalane of the Health Department (Thembalethu Clinic) and the well-known recording music artist, Zintle Langa.

These women told the girls of the importance of realising their worth and walking tall, with dignity and self-love.

Topics such as keeping their bodies safe, personal hygiene and setting boundaries within social circles were covered.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
